text:
The default mode network is being suppressed as the participant directs attention externally, likely focusing on visual details rather than self‑referential or narrative processing.  
High confidence; would lower if DMN activation rose or limbic activity increased.  
[Smallwood et al. 2021, Nat. Rev. Neurosci.]
raw:
The default mode network is being suppressed as the participant directs attention externally, likely focusing on visual details rather than self‑referential or narrative processing.  
High confidence; would lower if DMN activation rose or limbic activity increased.  
[Smallwood et al. 2021, Nat. Rev. Neurosci.]
